title: Daily Language Lesson
description: The complete structure for a single day's language lesson.

week.description: The week number of the lesson (e.g., 1).

day.description: The day number within the week (1-7).

title.description: The title of the daily lesson in English (e.g., 'Week 1 Day 1: Basic Greetings').

title_native.description: The title of the daily lesson translated into the target language.

theme.description: The overall theme for the day's lesson (e.g., 'Greetings & Introductions').

path.description: The learning path this lesson belongs to.

nativeLanguage.description: The user's native language for translations (e.g., 'English').

words.description: A list of vocabulary words for the day.

dialogues.description: A list of dialogues for conversational practice. Optional, but recommended.

exercises.description: A collection of exercises to reinforce learning.

cultural_note.description: A brief cultural tip related to the lesson's content.

pronunciation_tip.description: A specific tip to help with pronunciation for a word or sound in the lesson.

progress.description: Defines the rewards for completing the lesson.

target.description: The word or phrase in the target language.

phonetic.description: A simple phonetic spelling to aid pronunciation.

native_meaning.description: The meaning of the word in the native language.

english.description: The meaning of the word in English (for reference).

example_sentence_target.description: An example sentence using the word in the target language.

example_sentence_native.description: The translation of the example sentence in the native language.

example_sentence_phonetic.description: A simple phonetic spelling of the example sentence.

id.description: A unique identifier for the dialogue (e.g., 'd1_1_1').

context.description: The situation or context for the dialogue.

lines.description: The lines of conversation between speakers.

DialogueLine.description: A single line in a dialogue.

target.description: The sentence in the target language.

native.description: The sentence translated into the native language.

phonetic.description: A simple phonetic spelling of the sentence.

Exercises.description: An object containing different types of exercises.

sentence.description: A sentence with '___' where the answer should go.

correct.description: The 0-based index of the correct option in the 'options' array.

scrambled.description: An array of words in a scrambled order.

nativeHint.description: The translation of the sentence to guide the user.

streak_bonus.description: Bonus XP for maintaining a streak.

badge.description: A unique name for the badge awarded (e.g., 'W1D1-Greetings').
